header.title: Card
header.subtitle: Surface container for grouping related content. Supports default, raised, and interactive variants with an optional structured slot system.

anatomy.title: Anatomy
anatomy.description: A card is composed of the root container and optional sub-components: CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, and CardFooter.

parts.root: Root container. Controls the border, background, and radius via the nx-card CSS class.
parts.header: Top slot with a bottom border. Use for titles and actions. Rendered by CardHeader.
parts.title: Semibold primary text. Rendered by CardTitle as an <h3>.
parts.description:
Secondary muted text below the title. Rendered by CardDescription as a

.
parts.content: Main body slot with padding. Rendered by CardContent.
parts.footer: Bottom slot with a top border. Use for actions or metadata. Rendered by CardFooter.

variants.title: Variants
variants.description: Three variants control the background and interaction style. The interactive variant gains a hover effect suitable for clickable cards.

subComponents.title: Sub-components
subComponents.description: Structured composition with CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, and CardFooter for consistent layouts.

props.title: Props
props.description: Extends all native <div> attributes. Component-specific props listed below.

demos.cardDescription: Track progress and manage team resources.

props.variant: Visual style of the card. default uses surface background; raised uses surface-raised; interactive adds hover effects.
